text: What a paw-fect Tuesday! 🐾 Thank you to everyone who came out to our Philly Shih Tzus meetup at @theloganhotel & @urbanfarmerphl yesterday — it was so wonderful seeing familiar faces and welcoming new ones to our growing community. Huge thanks to @pawtraitpopup for this amazing group photo 💛✨ We can’t wait to see even more of you (and your pups!) at upcoming events — check the link in our bio to RSVP. #PhillyShihTzus #ShihTzuSquad
